message:
feat(conformance,python): refactor euler circuit validation and fix graph attr propagation in copy constructors

- fnx-conformance: simplify eulerian_circuit cycle validation using
  Rust's `let-chain` syntax (&&) instead of nested if-let, improving
  readability while preserving the same logic: check that the first
  and last edge endpoints match to confirm the circuit forms a cycle

- fnx-python digraph.rs + lib.rs: fix graph attribute propagation in
  the PyDiGraph and PyGraph copy/conversion constructors — after
  building the new graph from edges, apply any caller-supplied `attr`
  dict into `graph_attrs` via PyO3's `.update()` so that top-level
  graph metadata is correctly forwarded instead of silently dropped

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
